data.name: Helen

weaponImprint.name: Whispered Eternal Guard
weaponImprint.trait: Physical damage received is decreased by 8%.
weaponImprint.effect: Increase defense by 15%/20%/25%/30%/35%/40%. Basic attack damage increased by 25%/30%/35%/40%/45%/50%. Restore health at the end of action by 5% of maximum HP.
weaponImprint.imprintDescription: Increase damage dealt to Sica Technology units by 2.5%. If the target has Freeze debuffs, increase the damage by an additional 2.5%.

data.effects: Gentle in appearance, and extremely skilled at utilizing rules, adept at achieving desired goals through certain loopholes. Possesses extraordinary insight, always able to see through the essence of people's hearts beyond their surface behaviors. When interacting with those around her, she occasionally uses playful pranks to draw closer to others, guiding those who haven't realized their own feelings to epiphanies, and helping them overcome their weaknesses. In critical moments, she is also willing to sacrifice herself to protect the important people around her.

skills.name: Condensation
skills.description: Selects 1 enemy within 6 tiles, dealing Freeze damage equal to 80% of attack.

skills.name: Fearless Valkyrie
skills.description:
Helen is immune to healing reduction effects, but cannot receive healing or effects that convert healing into damage.

At the start of battle, increase defense and maximum HP by 30%.

At the start of turn, gain 2 points of Confectance Index, recovers HP equal to 25% of maximum HP and cleanse all debuffs.

Each time Helen takes damage, Helen gains 1 stack of [effect:8cc23ef7-8a65-4a10-a967-73d8a9965537|doll:helen]. While Helen has [effect:8cc23ef7-8a65-4a10-a967-73d8a9965537|doll:helen], the damage multiplier of her basic attack is increased to 180%. Before performing a basic attack, Helen gains attack equal to 15% of her defense.
skills.descriptionLevel2:
Helen is immune to healing reduction effects, but cannot receive healing or effects that convert healing into damage.

At the start of battle, increase defense and maximum HP by 30%, increase maximum stability to 16, and reduce damage taken by 50%.

At the start of turn, gain 2 points of Confectance Index, recovers HP equal to 25% of maximum HP and cleanse all debuffs.

Each time Helen takes damage, Helen gains 2 stacks of [effect:8cc23ef7-8a65-4a10-a967-73d8a9965537|doll:helen]. While Helen has [effect:8cc23ef7-8a65-4a10-a967-73d8a9965537|doll:helen], the damage multiplier of her basic attack is increased to 180%. Before performing a basic attack, Helen gains attack equal to 30% of her defense.
skills.descriptionLevel3:
Helen is immune to healing reduction effects, but cannot receive healing or effects that convert healing into damage.

At the start of battle, increase defense and maximum HP by 30%, increase maximum stability to 16, and reduce damage taken by 50%.

At the start of turn, gain 2 points of Confectance Index, recovers HP equal to 25% of maximum HP and cleanse all debuffs.

Each time an ally or Helen takes damage, Helen gains 2 stacks of [effect:8cc23ef7-8a65-4a10-a967-73d8a9965537|doll:helen]. While Helen has [effect:8cc23ef7-8a65-4a10-a967-73d8a9965537|doll:helen], the damage multiplier of her basic attack is increased to 300%. Before performing a basic attack, Helen gains attack equal to 70% of her defense.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel2.effect:
Increase maximum stability to 16 and damage taken is reduced by 50%.

Gain an additional [effect:8cc23ef7-8a65-4a10-a967-73d8a9965537|doll:helen] each time damage is taken. Before performing a normal attack, attack is increased equal to 30% of defense.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel3.effect:
When an allied unit takes damage, gain 2 stacks of [effect:8cc23ef7-8a65-4a10-a967-73d8a9965537|doll:helen]. While Helen has [effect:8cc23ef7-8a65-4a10-a967-73d8a9965537|doll:helen], the damage multiplier of her basic attack is increased to 300%. Before Helen uses basic attack, increase attack equal to 70% of defense.

TL Note: In CN, the line "Before Helen uses basic attack, increase Helen's attack by 70% of her defense" appears twice. CN testing has shown that the defense conversion is only 70%, not a total of 140%.

skills.name: Blessing Command
skills.description:
Selects 1 ally within 6 tiles and applies [effect:46f8c242-d465-4bd2-b5ae-aa9543342fc3|doll:helen], sharing damage, and cleanses [effect:fadf4f3f-2810-49f0-b947-6d683741429d] and [effect:e82fca4c-de4a-40b6-83c2-e84d716f72d3]. Only 1 [effect:46f8c242-d465-4bd2-b5ae-aa9543342fc3|doll:helen] may exist at a time.

After using this skill, Helen gains [effect:c1feeb2a-d9a9-4a73-9703-8806ee8cb9eb].
skills.descriptionLevel2:
Selects 1 ally within 6 tiles and applies [effect:46f8c242-d465-4bd2-b5ae-aa9543342fc3|doll:helen], sharing damage, and cleanses [effect:fadf4f3f-2810-49f0-b947-6d683741429d], [effect:e82fca4c-de4a-40b6-83c2-e84d716f72d3], [effect:b46e4270-c2d5-4f69-bb9b-544785785790], and [effect:dd0752a2-37c4-47ba-91ad-2dc640d2372b]. Only 1 [effect:46f8c242-d465-4bd2-b5ae-aa9543342fc3|doll:helen] may exist at a time.

If fatal damage is taken while sharing damage, Helen will not die and instead recover HP equal to 150% of her defense. This can be triggered once per turn.

After using this skill, Helen gains [effect:c1feeb2a-d9a9-4a73-9703-8806ee8cb9eb].

vertebraeUpgradeLevel2.effect:
Also cleanses [effect:b46e4270-c2d5-4f69-bb9b-544785785790] and [effect:dd0752a2-37c4-47ba-91ad-2dc640d2372b].

If fatal damage is taken while sharing damage, Helen will not die and instead recover HP equal to 150% of their defense. This can be triggered once per turn.

Allied units with [effect:46f8c242-d465-4bd2-b5ae-aa9543342fc3|doll:helen] deal 30% more Freeze damage.

skills.name: Covering Charge
skills.description:
Selects 1 tile within a cross-shaped area of 4 to 8 tiles, landing on the selected tile, cleanses 1 debuff from all allies in a path 5 tiles wide, applies [effect:abce6753-fe29-4ca3-b487-7453e982b279] for 2 turns. [effect:abce6753-fe29-4ca3-b487-7453e982b279] absorption amount is equal to 100% of Helen's initial attack, but cannot exceed 100% of the target's max HP. After the skill is used, generates [effect:3c3d2b25-6823-4ce4-a33e-cf69e0e759a5] tiles along the path for 2 turns.

For each 1 allied unit in the path (excluding Helen), this skill's shield efficiency is increased by 30% and the Helen recovers 2 points of Stability. After using this skill, the Helen gains an additional 6 tiles of movement and can use her basic attacks.
skills.descriptionLevel2:
Selects 1 tile within a cross-shaped area of 4 to 8 tiles, landing on the selected tile, cleanses 3 debuff from all allies in a path 7 tiles wide, applies [effect:9e535672-e66c-435a-a079-4c9fb3ee78d4|doll:helen] and [effect:abce6753-fe29-4ca3-b487-7453e982b279] for 2 turns. [effect:abce6753-fe29-4ca3-b487-7453e982b279] absorption amount is equal to 100% of Helen's initial attack, but cannot exceed 100% of the target's max HP. After the skill is used, generates [effect:3c3d2b25-6823-4ce4-a33e-cf69e0e759a5] tiles along the path for 2 turns.

For each 1 allied unit in the path (excluding Helen), this skill's shield efficiency is increased by 30% and the Helen recovers 2 points of Stability. After using this skill, the Helen gains an additional 6 tiles of movement and can use her basic attacks.
skills.descriptionLevel3:
Selects 1 tile within a cross-shaped area of 4 to 8 tiles, landing on the selected tile, cleanses 3 debuff from all allies in a path 7 tiles wide, applies [effect:9e535672-e66c-435a-a079-4c9fb3ee78d4|doll:helen] and [effect:abce6753-fe29-4ca3-b487-7453e982b279] for 2 turns. [effect:abce6753-fe29-4ca3-b487-7453e982b279] absorption amount is equal to 100% of Helen's initial attack, but cannot exceed 100% of the target's max HP. After the skill is used, generates [effect:3c3d2b25-6823-4ce4-a33e-cf69e0e759a5] tiles along the path for 2 turns.

For each 1 allied unit in the path (excluding Helen), this skill's shield efficiency is increased by 30% and the Helen recovers 4 points of Stability and gain the corresponding number of stacks of [effect:a95df31c-e365-49b2-a8c9-5b4f697477a8|doll:helen]. After using this skill, the Helen gains an additional 6 tiles of movement and can use her basic attacks.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel2.effect: Increase width by 2 tiles, cleanses 2 additional debuffs and applies [effect:9e535672-e66c-435a-a079-4c9fb3ee78d4|doll:helen] to all allies along the path for 2 turns.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel3.effect: For every 1 allied unit (excluding Helen) on the path, restore an additional 2 points of stability. Additionally, for every stability point restored, gain the corresponding amount of [effect:a95df31c-e365-49b2-a8c9-5b4f697477a8|doll:helen] stacks.

skills.name: Banner's Watch
skills.description:
Select 1 allied target with 6 tiles and applies [effect:39b8ce76-94f6-4ff7-b6be-8d2d1f3bcb26] and [effect:16e665b8-d576-4fc1-9c34-838e33b2e7ad] for 2 turns.

Reduced the cooldown of the Ultimate skill of all allied Freeze units (excluding Helen) by 1 turn.

After using this skill, Helen gains [effect:c1feeb2a-d9a9-4a73-9703-8806ee8cb9eb].
skills.descriptionLevel2:
Select 1 allied target with 6 tiles and applies [effect:39b8ce76-94f6-4ff7-b6be-8d2d1f3bcb26] and [effect:16e665b8-d576-4fc1-9c34-838e33b2e7ad] to the target and Helen for 2 turns.

Gains 10 [effect:8cc23ef7-8a65-4a10-a967-73d8a9965537|doll:helen] stacks.

Reduced the cooldown of the Ultimate skill of all allied Freeze units (excluding Helen) by 2 turns.

After using this skill, Helen gains [effect:c1feeb2a-d9a9-4a73-9703-8806ee8cb9eb].

vertebraeUpgradeLevel2.effect:
Cooldown is reduced by 2 turns.

Gain [effect:39b8ce76-94f6-4ff7-b6be-8d2d1f3bcb26] and [effect:16e665b8-d576-4fc1-9c34-838e33b2e7ad] for 2 turns as well as 10 stacks of [effect:8cc23ef7-8a65-4a10-a967-73d8a9965537|doll:helen].

Reduced the cooldown of the Ultimate skill of all allied Freeze units (excluding Helen) by 2 turns.

keys.effect: If defense is greater than or equal to enemy defense, deal 10% damage.
At the start of the battle, gain 3 stacks of [effect:8cc23ef7-8a65-4a10-a967-73d8a9965537|doll:helen].
When using a basic attack versus a boss, Freeze damage is increased by 20%.
When using a basic attack, cleanses 2 buffs from the target before the attack resolves.
At the end of action, applies 2 [effect:10b11942-01c9-4937-b446-1fe44c50d88a] to self and the target of [effect:46f8c242-d465-4bd2-b5ae-aa9543342fc3|doll:helen].
At the start of the turn if HP is greater than or equal to 30%, gain [effect:615f3476-7b69-4b52-995f-b60767e29f57|doll:helen].
Reduce stability damage taken by 2 and becomes immune to [effect:dd0752a2-37c4-47ba-91ad-2dc640d2372b] and [effect:e82fca4c-de4a-40b6-83c2-e84d716f72d3].

vertebrae.effect: Increase width by 2 tiles, cleanses 2 additional debuffs and applies [effect:9e535672-e66c-435a-a079-4c9fb3ee78d4|doll:helen] to all allies along the path for 2 turns.

doll.name: Helen
doll.effects: Gentle in appearance, and extremely skilled at utilizing rules, adept at achieving desired goals through certain loopholes. Possesses extraordinary insight, always able to see through the essence of people's hearts beyond their surface behaviors. When interacting with those around her, she occasionally uses playful pranks to draw closer to others, guiding those who haven't realized their own feelings to epiphanies, and helping them overcome their weaknesses. In critical moments, she is also willing to sacrifice herself to protect the important people around her.

doll.name: Helen
doll.effects: Gentle in appearance, and extremely skilled at utilizing rules, adept at achieving desired goals through certain loopholes. Possesses extraordinary insight, always able to see through the essence of people's hearts beyond their surface behaviors. When interacting with those around her, she occasionally uses playful pranks to draw closer to others, guiding those who haven't realized their own feelings to epiphanies, and helping them overcome their weaknesses. In critical moments, she is also willing to sacrifice herself to protect the important people around her.

skillsLevel3.name: Fearless Valkyrie
skillsLevel3.description:
Helen is immune to healing reduction effects, but cannot receive healing or effects that convert healing into damage.

At the start of battle, increase defense and maximum HP by 30%.

At the start of turn, gain 2 points of Confectance Index, recovers HP equal to 25% of maximum HP and cleanse all debuffs.

Each time Helen takes damage, Helen gains 1 stack of [effect:8cc23ef7-8a65-4a10-a967-73d8a9965537|doll:helen]. While Helen has [effect:8cc23ef7-8a65-4a10-a967-73d8a9965537|doll:helen], the damage multiplier of her basic attack is increased to 180%. Before performing a basic attack, Helen gains attack equal to 15% of her defense.
skillsLevel3.descriptionLevel2:
Helen is immune to healing reduction effects, but cannot receive healing or effects that convert healing into damage.

At the start of battle, increase defense and maximum HP by 30%, increase maximum stability to 16, and reduce damage taken by 50%.

At the start of turn, gain 2 points of Confectance Index, recovers HP equal to 25% of maximum HP and cleanse all debuffs.

Each time Helen takes damage, Helen gains 2 stacks of [effect:8cc23ef7-8a65-4a10-a967-73d8a9965537|doll:helen]. While Helen has [effect:8cc23ef7-8a65-4a10-a967-73d8a9965537|doll:helen], the damage multiplier of her basic attack is increased to 180%. Before performing a basic attack, Helen gains attack equal to 30% of her defense.
skillsLevel3.descriptionLevel3:
Helen is immune to healing reduction effects, but cannot receive healing or effects that convert healing into damage.

At the start of battle, increase defense and maximum HP by 30%, increase maximum stability to 16, and reduce damage taken by 50%.

At the start of turn, gain 2 points of Confectance Index, recovers HP equal to 25% of maximum HP and cleanse all debuffs.

Each time an ally or Helen takes damage, Helen gains 2 stacks of [effect:8cc23ef7-8a65-4a10-a967-73d8a9965537|doll:helen]. While Helen has [effect:8cc23ef7-8a65-4a10-a967-73d8a9965537|doll:helen], the damage multiplier of her basic attack is increased to 300%. Before performing a basic attack, Helen gains attack equal to 70% of her defense.

imagoforms.effect: The defense of all allied units with Frost Barrier is increased by 5%. Does not stack.
Physical and phase damage taken is reduced by 5%.
Freeze damage dealt is increased by 5%.
When not protected by cover, damage taken is reduced by 5%.
When stability is greater than 0, damage dealt is increased by 12%.

dollEffects.effectDetails:
{"mainDetails":"

When taking damage within 6 tiles of Helen, Helen shares 100% of the original damage with them. This buff cannot be cleansed.

","upgrades":[{"id":"96d262d3-7533-4792-8fa2-3a9c56cfca94","upgradeName":"V4","upgradeDetails":"

Freeze damage dealt is increased by 30%. When taking damage within 6 tiles of Helen, Helen shares 100% of the original damage with them. This buff cannot be cleansed.

","order":0}]}
For every 1 stack of this effect, Freeze damage dealt is increased by 20%, up to a maximum of 60%. This buff cannot be cleansed.
Own defense cannot be reduced below 100%. Removed when own HP falls below 30%. Cannot be cleansed.
For every 1 stack of this effect, increases own critical rate and Freeze damage dealt by basic attack by 10%. Can be stacked, consumed after attacking. Cannot be cleansed.
